text: diverey nechemeya ben-chakhaleya vayehi vechodesh kiselev kh kiseleyv q shenat 'eserim vaani hayiti beshushan habira
vayavo chanani echad meachay hu vaanashim mihuda vaeshealem 'al-hayehudim hapeleyta asher-nishearu min-hashevi ve'al-yerushalaim
vayomeru li hanishearim asher-nishearu min-hashevi sham bamedina bera'a gedola uvecherepa vechovmat yerushalaim meforatset ushe'areyha nitsetu vaesh
vayehi keshame'i ׀ et-hadevarim haele yashaveti vaeveke vaeteabela yamim vaehi tsam umitepalel lifeney elohey hashamayim
vaomar ana yehva elohey hashamayim hael hagadovl vehanovra shomer haberit vachesed leohavayv uleshomerey mitseotayv

tehi na azenekha-qashevet ve'eyneykha fetuuchovt lishemo'a el-tefilat 'avedekha asher anokhi mitepalel lefaneykha hayovm yovmam valayela 'al-beney yiserael 'avadeykha umitevade 'al-chatovt beney-yiserael asher chatanu lakh vaani uveyt-avi chatanu
chavol chavalenu lakh velo-shamarenu et-hamitseot veet-hachuqim veet-hamishepatim asher tsivita et-moshe 'avedekha
zekhar-na et-hadavar asher tsivita et-moshe 'avedekha lemor atem time'alu ani afits etekhem ba'amim
veshavetem elay ushemaretem mitseotay va'asitem otam im-yiheye nidachakhem biqetse hashamayim misham aqabetsem vahavovotim kh vahaviovtim q el-hamaqovm asher bachareti leshaken et-shemi sham
vehem 'avadeykha ve'amekha asher padita bekhochakha hagadovl uveyadekha hachazaqa

ana adonay tehi na azenekha-qashevet el-tefilat 'avedekha veel-tefilat 'avadeykha hachafetsim leyirea et-shemekha vehatselichah-na le'avedekha hayovm utenehu lerachamim lifeney haish haze vaani hayiti masheqe lamelekh f
vayehi ׀ bechodesh nisan shenat 'eserim learetacheshasete hamelekh yayin lefanayv vaesa et-hayayin vaetena lamelekh velo-hayiti ra' lefanayv
vayomer li hamelekh madu'a ׀ paneykha ra'im veata eynekha chovle eyn ze ki-im ro'a lev vaira harebe meod
vaomar lamelekh hamelekh le'ovlam yicheye madu'a lo-yere'u fanay asher ha'ir beyt-qiverovt avotay chareva ushe'areyha ukelu vaesh s
vayomer li hamelekh 'al-mah-ze ata mevaqesh vaetepalel el-elohey hashamayim
vaomar lamelekh im-'al-hamelekh tovv veim-yitav 'avedekha lefaneykha asher tishelacheni el-yehuda el-'ir qiverovt avotay veevenena
vayomer li hamelekh vehashegal ׀ yovshevet etselov 'ad-matay yiheye mahalakhakha umatay tashuv vayitav lifeney-hamelekh vayishelacheni vaetena lov zeman
vaovmar lamelekh im-'al-hamelekh tovv igerovt yitenu-li 'al-pachaovt 'ever hanahar asher ya'aviruni 'ad asher-avov el-yehuda

veigeret el-asaf shomer haparedes asher lamelekh asher yiten-li 'etsim leqarovt et-sha'arey habira asher-labayit ulechovmat ha'ir velabayit asher-avov elayv vayiten-li hamelekh keyad-elohay hatovva 'alay
vaavov el-pachaovt 'ever hanahar vaetena lahem et igerovt hamelekh vayishelach 'imi hamelekh sarey chayil ufarashim f
vayishema' sanevalat hachoroni vetovviya ha'eved ha'amoni vayera' lahem ra'a gedola asher-ba adam levaqesh tovva liveney yiserael
vaavov el-yerushalaim vaehi-sham yamim shelosha
vaaqum ׀ layela ani vaanashim ׀ me'at 'imi velo-higadeti leadam ma elohay noten el-libi la'asovt lirushalaim uvehema eyn 'imi ki im-habehema asher ani rokhev bah
vaetsea vesha'ar-hagay layela veel-peney 'eyn hatanin veel-sha'ar haashepot vaehi sover bechovmot yerushalaim asher hameforvatsim kh hem ׀ q perutsim q ushe'areyha ukelu vaesh
vae'evor el-sha'ar ha'ayin veel-berekhat hamelekh veeyn-maqovm labehema la'avor tachetay
vaehi 'ole vanachal layela vaehi sover bachovma vaashuv vaavov besha'ar hagaye vaashuv
vehaseganim lo yade'u ana halakheti uma ani 'ose velayehudim velakohanim velachorim velaseganim uleyeter 'ose hamelakha 'ad-ken lo higadeti
vaovmar alehem atem roim hara'a asher anachenu vah asher yerushalaim chareva ushe'areyha nitsetu vaesh lekhu venivene et-chovmat yerushalaim velo-niheye 'ovd cherepa
vaagid lahem et-yad elohay asher-hi tovva 'alay veaf-diverey hamelekh asher amar-li vayomeru naqum uvaninu vayechazequ yedeyhem latovva f
vayishema' sanevalat hachoroni vetoviya ׀ ha'eved ha'amovni vegeshem ha'arevi vayale'igu lanu vayivezu 'aleynu vayomeru mah-hadavar haze asher atem 'osim ha'al hamelekh atem moredim
vaashiv ovtam davar vaovmar lahem elohey hashamayim hu yatselicha lanu vaanachenu 'avadayv naqum uvaninu velakhem eyn-cheleq utsedaqa vezikarovn birushalaim
vayaqam eleyashiv hakohen hagadovl veechayv hakohanim vayivenu et-sha'ar hatson hema qideshuhu vaya'amidu daletotayv ve'ad-migedal hamea qideshuhu 'ad migedal chananeel s
ve'al-yadov vanu aneshey yerechov s ve'al-yadov vana zakur ben-imeri s
veet sha'ar hadagim banu beney hasenaa hema qeruhu vaya'amidu daletotayv mane'ulayv uverichayv s
ve'al-yadam hecheziq meremovt ben-uriya ben-haqovts s ve'al-yadam hecheziq meshulam ben-berekheya ben-mesheyzaveel s ve'al-yadam hecheziq tsadovq ben-ba'ana s
ve'al-yadam hecheziqu hateqov'im veadireyhem lo-heviu tsavaram ba'avodat adoneyhem s
veet sha'ar hayeshana hecheziqu yovyada' ben-pasecha umeshulam ben-besovdeya hema qeruhu vaya'amidu daletotayv umane'ulayv uverichayv s
ve'al-yadam hecheziq melateya hagive'oni veyadovn hameronoti aneshey give'ovn vehamitsepa lekhise pachat 'ever hanahar s
'al-yadov hecheziq 'uziel ben-charehaya tsovrefim s ve'al-yadov hecheziq chananeya ben-haraqachim vaya'azevu yerushalaim 'ad hachovma harechava s
ve'al-yadam hecheziq refaya ven-chur sar chatsi pelekh yerushalaim s
ve'al-yadam hecheziq yedaya ven-charumaf veneged beytov s ve'al-yadov hecheziq chatush ben-chashaveneya
mida shenit hecheziq malekiya ven-charim vechashuv ben-pachat movav veet migedal hatanurim s
ve'al-yadov hecheziq shalum ben-halovchesh sar chatsi pelekh yerushalaim hu uvenovtayv s
et sha'ar hagaye hecheziq chanun veyoshevey zanovcha hema vanuhu vaya'amidu daletotayv mane'ulayv uverichayv veelef ama bachovma 'ad sha'ar hashafovt
veet ׀ sha'ar haashepovt hecheziq malekiya ven-rekhav sar pelekh beyt-hakarem hu yivenenu veya'amid daletotayv mane'ulayv uverichayv s

veet sha'ar ha'ayin hecheziq shalun ben-kal-choze sar pelekh hamitsepa hu yivenenu vitalelenu veya'amidu kh veya'amid q daletotayv mane'ulayv uverichayv veet chovmat berekhat hashelach legan-hamelekh ve'ad-hama'alovt hayovredovt me'ir david s
acharayv hecheziq nechemeya ven-'azebuq sar chatsi pelekh beyt-tsur 'ad-neged qiverey david ve'ad-haberekha ha'asuya ve'ad beyt hagiborim s
acharayv hecheziqu haleviyim rechum ben-bani 'al-yadov hecheziq chashaveya sar-chatsi-felekh qe'ila lefilekov s
acharayv hecheziqu acheyhem bavay ben-chenadad sar chatsi pelekh qe'ila s
vayechazeq 'al-yadov 'ezer ben-yeshu'a sar hamitsepa mida shenit mineged 'alot hanesheq hamiqetso'a s
acharayv hechera hecheziq barukh ben zabay kh zakay q mida shenit min-hamiqetsov'a 'ad-petach beyt eleyashiv hakohen hagadovl s
acharayv hecheziq meremovt ben-uriya ben-haqovts mida shenit mipetach beyt eleyashiv ve'ad-takhelit beyt eleyashiv s
veacharayv hecheziqu hakohanim aneshey hakikar
acharayv hecheziq bineyamin vechashuv neged beytam s acharayv hecheziq 'azareya ven-ma'aseya ben-'ananeya etsel beytov s
acharayv hecheziq binuy ben-chenadad mida shenit mibeyt 'azareya 'ad-hamiqetsov'a ve'ad-hapina
palal ben-uzay mineged hamiqetsov'a vehamigedal hayovtse mibeyt hamelekh ha'eleyovn asher lachatsar hamatara acharayv pedaya ven-pare'osh s
vehanetinim hayu yoshevim ba'ofel 'ad neged sha'ar hamayim lamizerach vehamigedal hayovtse s
acharayv hecheziqu hateqo'im mida shenit mineged hamigedal hagadovl hayovtse ve'ad chovmat ha'ofel
me'al ׀ sha'ar hasusim hecheziqu hakohanim ish leneged beytov s
acharayv hecheziq tsadovq ben-imer neged beytov s veacharayv hecheziq shema'eya ven-shekhaneya shomer sha'ar hamizerach s
acharey kh acharayv q hecheziq chananeya ven-shelemeya vechanun ben-tsalaf hashishi mida sheni s acharayv hecheziq meshulam ben-berekheya neged nishekatov s
acharey kh acharayv q hecheziq malekiya ben-hatsorefi 'ad-beyt hanetinim veharokhelim neged sha'ar hamifeqad ve'ad 'aliyat hapina
uveyn 'aliyat hapina lesha'ar hatson hecheziqu hatsorefim veharokhelim f
yehi kaasher shama' sanevalat ki-anachenu vovnim et-hachovma vayichar lov vayikhe'as harebe vayale'eg 'al-hayehudim
vayomer ׀ lifeney echayv vecheyl shomerovn vayomer ma hayehudim haamelalim 'osim haya'azevu lahem hayizebachu hayekhalu vayovm hayechayu et-haavanim me'aremovt he'afar vehema serufovt
vetovviya ha'amoni etselov vayomer gam asher-hem bovnim im-ya'ale shu'al ufarats chovmat aveneyhem f
shema' eloheynu ki-hayinu vuza vehashev cherepatam el-rosham utenem leviza beerets shiveya
veal-tekhas 'al-'aonam vechatatam milefaneykha al-timache ki hikhe'isu leneged habovnim
vanivene et-hachovma vatiqasher kal-hachovma 'ad-chetseyah vayehi lev la'am la'asovt f
vayehi khaasher shama' sanevalat vetovviya veha'arevim veha'amonim vehaashedovdim ki-'aleta arukha lechomovt yerushalaim ki-hechelu haperutsim lehisatem vayichar lahem meod
vayiqesheru khulam yachedav lavov lehilachem birushalaim vela'asovt lov tov'a
vanitepalel el-eloheynu vana'amid mishemar 'aleyhem yovmam valayela mipeneyhem
vayomer yehuda kashal kocha hasabal vehe'afar harebe vaanachenu lo nukhal livenovt bachovma
vayomeru tsareynu lo yede'u velo yireu 'ad asher-navov el-tovkham vaharagenum vehishebatenu et-hamelakha
vayehi kaasher-bau hayehudim hayoshevim etselam vayomeru lanu 'eser pe'amim mikal-hameqomovt asher-tashuvu 'aleynu
vaa'amid mitachetiyovt lamaqovm meacharey lachovma batsechichiyim kh batsechichim q vaa'amid et-ha'am lemishepachovt 'im-charevoteyhem ramecheyhem veqashetoteyhem
vaere vaaqum vaomar el-hachorim veel-haseganim veel-yeter ha'am al-tireu mipeneyhem et-adonay hagadovl vehanovra zekhoru vehilachamu 'al-acheykhem beneykhem uvenoteykhem nesheykhem uvateykhem f
vayehi kaasher-shame'u ovyeveynu ki-novda' lanu vayafer haelohim et-'atsatam vanashuv kh vanashav q kulanu el-hachovma ish el-melakhetov
vayehi ׀ min-hayovm hahu chatsi ne'aray 'osim bamelakha vechetseyam machaziqim veharemachim hamaginim vehaqeshatovt vehashireyonim vehasarim acharey kal-beyt yehuda
habovnim bachovma vehanoseim basevel 'omesim beachat yadov 'ose vamelakha veachat machazeqet hashalach
vehabovnim ish charebov asurim 'al-matenayv uvovnim vehatovqe'a bashovfar etseli
vaomar el-hachorim veel-haseganim veel-yeter ha'am hamelakha harebe urechava vaanachenu niferadim 'al-hachovma rechovqim ish meachiv
bimeqovm asher tisheme'u et-qovl hashovfar shama tiqavetsu eleynu eloheynu yilachem lanu
vaanachenu 'osim bamelakha vechetseyam machaziqim baremachim me'alovt hashachar 'ad tset hakovkhavim
gam ba'et hahi amareti la'am ish vena'arov yalinu betovkh yerushalaim vehayu-lanu halayela mishemar vehayovm melakha
veeyn ani veachay une'aray veaneshey hamishemar asher acharay eyn-anachenu foshetim begadeynu ish shilechov hamayim s
vatehi tsa'aqat ha'am unesheyhem gedovla el-acheyhem hayehudim
veyesh asher omerim baneynu uvenoteynu anachenu rabim veniqecha dagan venokhela venicheye
veyesh asher omerim sedoteynu ukherameynu uvateynu anachenu 'orevim veniqecha dagan bara'av
veyesh asher omerim lavinu khesef lemidat hamelekh sedoteynu ukherameynu
ve'ata kivesar acheynu besarenu kiveneyhem baneynu vehine anachenu khoveshim et-baneynu veet-benoteynu la'avadim veyesh mibenoteynu nikhebashovt veeyn leel yadenu usedoteynu ukherameynu laacherim
vayichar li meod kaasher shama'eti et-za'aqatam veet hadevarim haele
vayimalekh libi 'alay vaariva et-hachorim veet-haseganim vaomera lahem masha ish-beachiv atem noshiym vaeten 'aleyhem qehila gedovla
vaomera lahem anachenu qaninu et-acheynu hayehudim hanimekarim lagovyim kedey vanu vegam-atem timekeru et-acheykhem venimekeru-lanu vayacharishu velo matseu davar s
vayomer kh vaovmar q lo-tovv hadavar asher-atem 'osim halov beyireat eloheynu telekhu mecherepat hagovyim ovyeveynu
vegam-ani achay une'aray noshim bahem kesef vedagan na'azevah-na et-hamasha haze
hashivu na lahem kehayovm sedoteyhem karemeyhem zeyteyhem uvateyhem umeat hakesef vehadagan hatirovsh vehayitsehar asher atem noshim bahem
vayomeru nashiv umehem lo nevaqesh ken na'ase kaasher ata ovmer vaeqera et-hakohanim vaashebi'em la'asovt kadavar haze

gam-chatseni na'areti vaomera kakha yena'er haelohim et-kal-haish asher lo-yaqim et-hadavar haze mibeytov umigi'ov vekhakha yiheye na'ur vareq vayomeru khal-haqahal amen vayehalelu et-yehva vaya'as ha'am kadavar haze
gam miyovm ׀ asher-tsiva oti liheyovt pecham beerets yehuda mishenat 'eserim ve'ad shenat sheloshim ushetayim learetacheshasete hamelekh shanim sheteym 'esere ani veachay lechem hapecha lo akhaleti
vehapachovt harishonim asher-lefanay hikhebidu 'al-ha'am vayiqechu mehem belechem vayayin achar kesef-sheqalim areba'im gam na'areyhem shaletu 'al-ha'am vaani lo-'asiti khen mipeney yireat elohim
vegam bimelekhet hachovma hazot hechezaqeti vesade lo qaninu vekhal-ne'aray qevutsim sham 'al-hamelakha
vehayehudim vehaseganim mea vachamishim ish vehabaim eleynu min-hagovyim asher-sevivoteynu 'al-shulechani
vaasher haya na'ase leyovm echad shovr echad tson shesh-berurovt vetsiporim na'asu-li uveyn 'aseret yamim bekhal-yayin leharebe ve'im-ze lechem hapecha lo viqasheti ki-khaveda ha'avoda 'al-ha'am haze
zakherah-li elohay letovva kol asher-'asiti 'al-ha'am haze f
vayehi khaasher nishema' lesanevalat vetovviya ulegeshem ha'arevi uleyeter oyeveynu ki vaniti et-hachovma velo-novtar bah parets gam 'ad-ha'et hahi delatovt lo-he'emadeti vashe'arim
vayishelach sanevalat vegeshem elay lemor lekha veniva'ada yachedav bakefirim beviqe'at ovnov vehema choshevim la'asovt li ra'a
vaeshelecha 'aleyhem maleakhim lemor melakha gedovla ani 'ose velo ukhal laredet lama tishebat hamelakha kaasher arepeha veyaradeti aleykhem
vayishelechu elay kadavar haze areba' pe'amim vaashiv ovtam kadavar haze s
vayishelach elay sanevalat kadavar haze pa'am chamishit et-na'arov veigeret petucha beyadov
katuv bah bagovyim nishema' vegashemu omer ata vehayehudim choshevim limerovd 'al-ken ata vovne hachovma veata hove lahem lemelekh kadevarim haele
vegam-neviim he'emadeta liqero 'aleykha virushalaim lemor melekh bihuda ve'ata yishama' lamelekh kadevarim haele ve'ata lekha veniva'atsa yachedav s
vaeshelecha elayv lemor lo niheya kadevarim haele asher ata ovmer ki milibekha ata vovdam
ki khulam meyareim ovtanu lemor yirepu yedeyhem min-hamelakha velo te'ase ve'ata chazeq et-yaday
vaani-vati beyt shema'eya ven-delaya ben-meheytaveel vehu 'atsur vayomer niva'ed el-beyt haelohim el-tovkh haheykhal venisegera daletovt haheykhal ki baim leharegekha velayela baim leharegekha
vaomera haish kamovni yiverach umi khamovni asher-yavov el-haheykhal vachay lo avov
vaakira vehine lo-elohim shelachov ki hanevua diber 'alay vetovviya vesanevalat sekharov
lema'an sakhur hu lema'an-ira vee'eseh-ken vechatati vehaya lahem leshem ra' lema'an yecharefuni f
zakhera elohay letovviya ulesanevalat kema'asayv ele vegam lenov'adeya hanevia uleyeter haneviim asher hayu meyareim ovti
vatishelam hachovma be'eserim vachamisha leelul lachamishim ushenayim yovm f
vayehi kaasher shame'u kal-ovyeveynu vayireu kal-hagovyim asher sevivoteynu vayipelu meod be'eyneyhem vayede'u ki meet eloheynu ne'eseta hamelakha hazot
gam ׀ bayamim hahem marebim chorey yehuda igeroteyhem hovlekhovt 'al-tovviya vaasher letovviya baovt aleyhem
ki-rabim bihuda ba'aley shevu'a lov ki-chatan hu lishekhaneya ven-arach vihovchanan benov laqach et-bat-meshulam ben berekheya
gam tovvotayv hayu omerim lefanay udevaray hayu movtsiim lov igerovt shalach tovviya leyareeni
vayehi kaasher niveneta hachovma vaa'amid hadelatovt vayipaqedu hashov'arim vehameshorerim vehaleviyim
vaatsave et-chanani achi veet-chananeya sar habira 'al-yerushalaim ki-hu keish emet veyare et-haelohim merabim

vayomer kh vaomar q lahem lo yipatechu sha'arey yerushalaim 'ad-chom hashemesh ve'ad hem 'omedim yagifu hadelatovt veechozu veha'ameyd mishemerovt yoshevey yerushalaim ish bemishemarov veish neged beytov
veha'ir rachavat yadayim ugedovla veha'am me'at betovkhah veeyn batim benuyim
vayiten elohay el-libi vaeqebetsa et-hachorim veet-haseganim veet-ha'am lehiteyaches vaemetsa sefer hayachas ha'ovlim barishovna vaemetsa katuv bov f
ele ׀ beney hamedina ha'olim mishevi hagovla asher hegela nevukhadenetsar melekh bavel vayashuvu lirushalaim velihuda ish le'irov
habaim 'im-zerubavel yeshu'a nechemeya 'azareya ra'ameya nachamani maredokhay bileshan miseperet bigevay nechum ba'ana misepar aneshey 'am yiserael s
beney fare'osh alepayim mea veshive'im ushenayim s
beney shefateya shelosh meovt shive'im ushenayim s
beney arach shesh meovt chamishim ushenayim s
beney-fachat movav liveney yeshu'a veyovav alepayim ushemone meovt shemona 'asar s
beney 'eylam elef matayim chamishim veareba'a s
beney zatu shemone meovt areba'im vachamisha s
beney zakay sheva' meovt veshishim s
beney vinuy shesh meovt areba'im ushemona s
beney vevay shesh meovt 'eserim ushemona s
beney 'azegad alepayim shelosh meovt 'eserim ushenayim s
beney adoniqam shesh meovt shishim veshive'a s
beney vigevay alepayim shishim veshive'a s
beney 'adin shesh meovt chamishim vachamisha s
beney-ater lechizeqiya tishe'im ushemona s
beney chashum shelosh meovt 'eserim ushemona s
beney vetsay shelosh meovt 'eserim veareba'a s
beney charif mea sheneym 'asar s
beney give'ovn tishe'im vachamisha s
aneshey veyt-lechem unetofa mea shemonim ushemona s
aneshey 'anatovt mea 'eserim ushemona s
aneshey veyt-'azemavet areba'im ushenayim s
aneshey qireyat ye'arim kefira uveerovt sheva' meovt areba'im ushelosha s
aneshey harama vagava' shesh meovt 'eserim veechad s
aneshey mikhemas mea ve'eserim ushenayim s
aneshey veyt-el veha'ay mea 'eserim ushelosha s
aneshey nevov acher chamishim ushenayim s
beney 'eylam acher elef matayim chamishim veareba'a s
beney charim shelosh meovt ve'eserim s
beney yerechov shelosh meovt areba'im vachamisha s
beney-lod chadid veovnov sheva' meovt ve'eserim veechad s
beney senaa sheloshet alafim tesha' meovt usheloshim f
hakohanim beney yeda'eya leveyt yeshu'a tesha' meovt shive'im ushelosha s
beney imer elef chamishim ushenayim s
beney fashechur elef matayim areba'im veshive'a s
beney charim elef shive'a 'asar f
haleviyim beney-yeshu'a leqademiel liveney lehovdeva shive'im veareba'a s
hameshorerim beney asaf mea areba'im ushemona s
hasho'arim beney-shalum beney-ater beney-talemon beney-'aquv beney chatita beney shovay mea sheloshim ushemona s
hanetinim beney-tsicha veney-chasufa beney taba'ovt
beney-qeyros beney-si'a beney fadovn
beney-levana veney-chagava beney shalemay
beney-chanan beney-gidel beney-gachar
beney-reaya veney-retsin beney neqovda

kal-hanetinim uveney 'avedey shelomo shelosh meovt tishe'im ushenayim f

beney-delaya veney-tovviya beney neqovda shesh meovt veareba'im ushenayim s
umin-hakohanim beney chovaya beney haqovts beney varezilay asher laqach mibenovt barezilay hagile'adi isha vayiqare 'al-shemam
ele biqeshu khetavam hamiteyachesim velo nimetsa vayegoalu min-hakehuna
vayomer hatireshata lahem asher lo-yokhelu miqodesh haqodashim 'ad 'amod hakohen leurim vetumim
kal-haqahal keechad areba' ribov alepayim shelosh-meovt veshishim
milevad 'avedeyhem veamehoteyhem ele shive'at alafim shelosh meovt sheloshim veshive'a velahem meshorarim umeshorarovt matayim veareba'im vachamisha s
gemalim areba' meovt sheloshim vachamisha s chamorim sheshet alafim sheva' meovt ve'eserim
umiqetsat rashey haavovt natenu lamelakha hatireshata natan laovtsar zahav darekemonim elef mizeraqovt chamishim katenovt kohanim sheloshim vachamesh meovt
umerashey haavovt natenu leovtsar hamelakha zahav darekemovnim shetey ribovt vekhesef manim alepayim umatayim
vaasher natenu sheerit ha'am zahav darekemovnim shetey ribov vekhesef manim alepayim vekhatenot kohanim shishim veshive'a f
vayeshevu hakohanim vehaleviyim vehashov'arim vehameshorerim umin-ha'am vehanetinim vekhal-yiserael be'areyhem vayiga' hachodesh hashevi'i uveney yiserael be'areyhem
vayeasefu khal-ha'am keish echad el-harechovv asher lifeney sha'ar-hamayim vayomeru le'ezera hasofer lehavi et-sefer tovrat moshe asher-tsiva yehva et-yiserael
vayavi 'ezera hakohen et-hatovra lifeney haqahal meish ve'ad-isha vekhol mevin lishemo'a beyovm echad lachodesh hashevi'i
vayiqera-vov lifeney harechovv asher ׀ lifeney sha'ar-hamayim min-haovr 'ad-machatsit hayovm neged haanashim vehanashim vehamevinim veazeney khal-ha'am el-sefer hatovra

vaya'amod 'ezera hasofer 'al-migedal-'ets asher 'asu ladavar vaya'amod etselov matiteya veshema' va'anaya veuriya vechileqiya uma'aseya 'al-yeminov umisemolov pedaya umishael umalekiya vechashum vechashebadana zekhareya meshulam f
vayifetach 'ezera hasefer le'eyney khal-ha'am ki-me'al kal-ha'am haya ukhefitechov 'amedu khal-ha'am
vayevarekh 'ezera et-yehva haelohim hagadovl vaya'anu khal-ha'am amen ׀ amen bemo'al yedeyhem vayiqedu vayishetachavu layhva apayim aretsa
veyeshu'a uvani veshereveya ׀ yamin 'aquv shabetay ׀ hovdiya ma'aseya qelita 'azareya yovzavad chanan pelaya vehaleviyim mevinim et-ha'am latovra veha'am 'al-'amedam
vayiqereu vasefer betovrat haelohim meforash vesovm sekhel vayavinu bamiqera s

vayomer nechemeya hu hatireshata ve'ezera hakohen ׀ hasofer vehaleviyim hamevinim et-ha'am lekhal-ha'am hayovm qadosh-hu layhva eloheykhem al-titeabelu veal-tiveku ki vovkhim kal-ha'am keshame'am et-diverey hatovra
vayomer lahem lekhu ikhelu mashemanim ushetu mametaqim veshilechu manovt leeyn nakhovn lov ki-qadovsh hayovm laadoneynu veal-te'atsevu ki-chedevat yehva hi ma'uzekhem
vehaleviyim macheshim lekhal-ha'am lemor hasu ki hayovm qadosh veal-te'atsevu
vayelekhu khal-ha'am leekhol velishetovt uleshalach manovt vela'asovt simecha gedovla ki hevinu badevarim asher hovdi'u lahem s
uvayovm hasheni neesefu rashey haavovt lekhal-ha'am hakohanim vehaleviyim el-'ezera hasofer ulehasekil el-diverey hatovra
vayimetseu katuv batovra asher tsiva yehva beyad-moshe asher yeshevu veney-yiserael basukovt bechag bachodesh hashevi'i
vaasher yashemi'u veya'aviru qovl bekhal-'areyhem uvirushalaim lemor tseu hahar vehaviu 'aley-zayit va'aley-'ets shemen va'aley hadas va'aley temarim va'aley 'ets 'avot la'asot sukot kakatuv f
vayetseu ha'am vayaviu vaya'asu lahem sukovt ish 'al-gagov uvechatseroteyhem uvechatserovt beyt haelohim uvirechovv sha'ar hamayim uvirechovv sha'ar eferayim
vaya'asu khal-haqahal hashavim min-hashevi ׀ sukovt vayeshevu vasukovt ki lo-'asu mimey yeshu'a bin-nun ken beney yiserael 'ad hayovm hahu vatehi simecha gedovla meod
vayiqera besefer tovrat haelohim yovm ׀ beyovm min-hayovm harishovn 'ad hayovm haacharovn vaya'asu-chag shive'at yamim uvayovm hashemini 'atseret kamishepat f
uveyovm 'eserim veareba'a lachodesh haze neesefu veney-yiserael betsovm uvesaqim vaadama 'aleyhem
vayibadelu zera' yiserael mikol beney nekhar vaya'amedu vayitevadu 'al-chatoteyhem va'aonovt avoteyhem
vayaqumu 'al-'amedam vayiqereu besefer tovrat yehva eloheyhem revi'it hayovm urevi'it mitevadim umishetachavim layhva eloheyhem f
vayaqam 'al-ma'ale haleviyim yeshu'a uvani qademiel shevaneya buni shereveya bani khenani vayize'aqu beqovl gadovl el-yehva eloheyhem

vayomeru haleviyim yeshu'a veqademiel bani chashaveneya shereveya hovdiya shevaneya fetacheya qumu barakhu et-yehva eloheykhem min-ha'ovlam 'ad-ha'ovlam vivarekhu shem kevovdekha umerovmam 'al-kal-berakha utehila

atah-hu yehva levadekha at kh ata q 'asita et-hashamayim shemey hashamayim vekhal-tsevaam haarets vekhal-asher 'aleyha hayamim vekhal-asher bahem veata mechaye et-kulam utseva hashamayim lekha mishetachavim
atah-hu yehva haelohim asher bachareta beaveram vehovtsetov meur kasedim vesameta shemov averaham
umatsata et-levavov neeman lefaneykha vekharovt 'imov haberit latet et-erets hakena'ani hachiti haemori vehaperizi vehayevusi vehagiregashi latet lezare'ov vataqem et-devareykha ki tsadiq ata
vatere et-'oni avoteynu bemitserayim veet-za'aqatam shama'eta 'al-yam-suf
vatiten otot umofetim befare'o uvekhal-'avadayv uvekhal-'am aretsov ki yada'eta ki hezidu 'aleyhem vata'as-lekha shem kehayovm haze
vehayam baqa'eta lifeneyhem vaya'averu vetovkhe-hayam bayabasha veet-rodefeyhem hishelakheta vimetsovlot kemov-even bemayim 'azim
uve'amud 'anan hinechitam yovmam uve'amud esh layela lehair lahem et-haderekh asher yelekhu-vah
ve'al har-sinay yaradeta vedaber 'imahem mishamayim vatiten lahem mishepatim yesharim vetovrovt emet chuqim umitseot tovvim
veet-shabat qadeshekha hovda'ata lahem umitseovt vechuqim vetovra tsivita lahem beyad moshe 'avedekha
velechem mishamayim natata lahem lire'avam umayim misela' hovtseta lahem litsemaam vatomer lahem lavov lareshet et-haarets asher-nasata et-yadekha latet lahem
vehem vaavoteynu hezidu vayaqeshu et-'arepam velo shame'u el-mitseoteykha

vayemaanu lishemo'a velo-zakheru nifeleoteykha asher 'asita 'imahem vayaqeshu et-'arepam vayitenu-rosh lashuv le'avedutam bemireyam veata elovha selichovt chanun verachum erekhe-apayim verav vechesed kh chesed q velo 'azavetam
af ki-'asu lahem 'egel masekha vayomeru ze eloheykha asher he'elekha mimitserayim vaya'asu neatsovt gedolovt
veata berachameykha harabim lo 'azavetam bamidebar et-'amud he'anan lo-sar me'aleyhem beyovmam lehanechotam behaderekh veet-'amud haesh belayela lehair lahem veet-haderekh asher yelekhu-vah
veruchakha hatovva natata lehasekilam umanekha lo-mana'eta mipihem umayim natata lahem litsemaam
veareba'im shana kilekaletam bamidebar lo chaseru salemoteyhem lo valu verageleyhem lo vatsequ
vatiten lahem mamelakhovt va'amamim vatacheleqem lefea vayireshu et-erets sichovn veet-erets melekh cheshebovn veet-erets 'ovg melekhe-habashan
uveneyhem hirebita kekhokhevey hashamayim vateviem el-haarets asher-amareta laavoteyhem lavov larashet
vayavou habanim vayireshu et-haarets vatakhena' lifeneyhem et-yoshevey haarets hakena'anim vatitenem beyadam veet-malekheyhem veet-'amemey haarets la'asovt bahem kiretsovnam
vayilekedu 'arim betsurovt vaadama shemena vayireshu batim meleim-kal-tuv borovt chatsuvim keramim vezeytim ve'ets maakhal larov vayokhelu vayisebe'u vayasheminu vayite'adenu betuvekha hagadovl
vayameru vayimeredu bakh vayashelikhu et-tovratekha acharey gavam veet-nevieykha haragu asher-he'idu vam lahashivam eleykha vaya'asu neatsovt gedovlot
vatitenem beyad tsareyhem vayatseru lahem uve'et tsaratam yitse'aqu eleykha veata mishamayim tishema' ukherachameykha harabim titen lahem movshi'im veyovshi'um miyad tsareyhem
ukhenovcha lahem yashuvu la'asovt ra' lefaneykha vata'azevem beyad oyeveyhem vayiredu vahem vayashuvu vayize'aqukha veata mishamayim tishema' vetatsilem kerachameykha rabovt 'itim
vata'ad bahem lahashivam el-tovratekha vehema hezidu velo-shame'u lemitseoteykha uvemishepateykha chateu-vam asher-ya'ase adam vechaya vahem vayitenu khatef sovreret ve'arepam hiqeshu velo shame'u
vatimeshokh 'aleyhem shanim rabovt vata'ad bam beruchakha beyad-nevieykha velo heezinu vatitenem beyad 'amey haaratsot
uverachameykha harabim lo-'asitam kala velo 'azavetam ki el-chanun verachum ata

ve'ata eloheynu hael hagadovl hagibovr vehanovra shovmer haberit vehachesed al-yime'at lefaneykha et kal-hatelaa asher-metsaatenu limelakheynu lesareynu ulekhohaneynu velinevienu velaavoteynu ulekhal-'amekha mimey malekhey ashur 'ad hayovm haze

veet-melakheynu sareynu kohaneynu vaavoteynu lo 'asu tovratekha velo hiqeshivu el-mitseoteykha ule'edeoteykha asher ha'idota bahem
vehem bemalekhutam uvetuvekha harav asher-natata lahem uveerets harechava vehashemena asher-natata lifeneyhem lo 'avadukha velo-shavu mima'aleleyhem hara'im
hine anachenu hayovm 'avadim vehaarets asher-natata laavoteynu leekhol et-pireyah veet-tuvah hine anachenu 'avadim 'aleyha
utevuatah mareba lamelakhim asher-natata 'aleynu bechatovteynu ve'al geviyoteynu moshelim uvivehemetenu kiretsovnam uvetsara gedovla anachenu f

ushear ha'am hakohanim haleviyim hashov'arim hameshorerim hanetinim vekhal-hanivedal me'amey haaratsovt el-tovrat haelohim nesheyhem beneyhem uvenoteyhem kol yovde'a mevin
machaziqim 'al-acheyhem adireyhem uvaim beala uvishevu'a lalekhet betovrat haelohim asher nitena beyad moshe 'eved-haelohim velishemovr vela'asovt et-kal-mitseot yehva adoneynu umishepatayv vechuqayv
vaasher lo-niten benoteynu le'amey haarets veet-benoteyhem lo niqach levaneynu
ve'amey haarets hameviim et-hamaqachovt vekhal-shever beyovm hashabat limekovr lo-niqach mehem bashabat uveyovm qodesh venitosh et-hashana hashevi'it umasha khal-yad
vehe'emadenu 'aleynu mitseot latet 'aleynu shelishit hasheqel bashana la'avodat beyt eloheynu
lelechem hama'arekhet uminechat hatamid ule'ovlat hatamid hashabatovt hechodashim lamov'adim velaqodashim velachataovt lekhaper 'al-yiserael vekhol melekhet beyt-eloheynu s
vehagovralovt hipalenu 'al-qureban ha'etsim hakohanim haleviyim veha'am lehavi leveyt eloheynu leveyt-avoteynu le'itim mezumanim shana veshana leva'er 'al-mizebach yehva eloheynu kakatuv batovra
ulehavi et-bikurey adematenu uvikurey kal-peri khal-'ets shana veshana leveyt yehva
veet-bekhorovt baneynu uvehemeteynu kakatuv batovra veet-bekhovrey veqareynu vetsoneynu lehavi leveyt eloheynu lakohanim hamesharetim beveyt eloheynu
veet-reshit 'arisoteynu uterumoteynu uferi khal-'ets tirovsh veyitsehar navi lakohanim el-lishekhovt beyt-eloheynu uma'esar adematenu laleviyim vehem haleviyim hame'aserim bekhol 'arey 'avodatenu
vehaya hakohen ben-aharon 'im-haleviyim ba'eser haleviyim vehaleviyim ya'alu et-ma'asar hama'aser leveyt eloheynu el-haleshakhovt leveyt haovtsar

ki el-haleshakhovt yaviu veney-yiserael uveney halevi et-terumat hadagan hatirovsh vehayitsehar vesham keley hamiqedash vehakohanim hamesharetim vehashov'arim vehameshorerim velo na'azov et-beyt eloheynu
vayeshevu sarey-ha'am birushalaim ushear ha'am hipilu govralovt lehavi ׀ echad min-ha'asara lashevet birushalaim 'ir haqodesh vetesha' hayadovt be'arim
vayevarakhu ha'am lekhol haanashim hamitenadevim lashevet birushalaim f
veele rashey hamedina asher yashevu birushalaim uve'arey yehuda yashevu ish baachuzatov be'areyhem yiserael hakohanim vehaleviyim vehanetinim uveney 'avedey shelomo
uvirushalaim yashevu mibeney yehuda umibeney vineyamin mibeney yehuda 'ataya ven-'uziya ben-zekhareya ven-amareya ben-shefateya ven-mahalaleel mibeney-farets
uma'aseya ven-barukh ben-kal-choze ben-chazaya ven-'adaya ven-yovyariv ben-zekhareya ben-hashiloni ׃
kal-beney-ferets hayoshevim birushalaim areba' meovt shishim ushemona aneshey-chayil s
veele beney vineyamin salu ben-meshulam ben-yov'ed ben-pedaya ven-qovlaya ven-ma'aseya ben-itiel ben-yesha'eya
veacharayv gabay salay tesha' meovt 'eserim ushemona
veyovel ben-zikheri paqid 'aleyhem vihuda ven-hasenua 'al-ha'ir mishene f
min-hakohanim yeda'eya ven-yovyariv yakhin
seraya ven-chileqiya ben-meshulam ben-tsadovq ben-merayovt ben-achituv negid beyt haelohim
vaacheyhem 'osey hamelakha labayit shemone meovt 'eserim ushenayim va'adaya ben-yerocham ben-pelaleya ben-ametsi ven-zekhareya ben-pashechur ben-malekiya
veechayv rashim leavovt matayim areba'im ushenayim va'amashesay ben-'azareel ben-achezay ben-meshilemovt ben-imer
vaacheyhem gibovrey chayil mea 'eserim ushemona ufaqid 'aleyhem zavediel ben-hagedovlim s
umin-haleviyim shema'eya ven-chashuv ben-'azeriqam ben-chashaveya ben-buni
veshabetay veyovzavad 'al-hamelakha hachitsona leveyt haelohim merashey haleviyim
umataneya ven-mikha ben-zavedi ven-asaf rosh hatechila yehovde latefila uvaqebuqeya mishene meechayv ve'aveda ben-shamu'a ben-galal ben yeditun kh yedutun q
kal-haleviyim be'ir haqodesh matayim shemonim veareba'a f

ushear yiserael hakohanim haleviyim bekhal-'arey yehuda ish benachalatov
vehanetinim yoshevim ba'ofel vetsicha vegishepa 'al-hanetinim f
ufeqid haleviyim birushalaim 'uzi ven-bani ben-chashaveya ben-mataneya ben-mikha mibeney asaf hameshorerim leneged melekhet beyt-haelohim
ki-mitsevat hamelekh 'aleyhem vaamana 'al-hameshorerim devar-yovm beyovmov
ufetacheya ben-mesheyzaveel mibeney-zerach ben-yehuda leyad hamelekh lekhal-davar la'am
veel-hachatserim bisedotam mibeney yehuda yashevu beqireyat haareba' uvenoteyha uvedivon uvenoteyha uviqavetseel vachatsereyha

haleviyim bimey eleyashiv yovyada' veyovchanan veyadu'a ketuvim rashey avovt vehakohanim 'al-malekhut dareyavesh haparesi f
beney levi rashey haavovt ketuvim 'al-sefer diverey hayamim ve'ad-yemey yovchanan ben-eleyashiv
verashey haleviyim chashaveya shereveya veyeshu'a ben-qademiel vaacheyhem lenegedam lehalel lehovdovt bemitsevat david ish-haelohim mishemar le'umat mishemar
mataneya uvaqebuqeya 'ovadeya meshulam talemovn 'aquv shomerim shov'arim mishemar baasupey hashe'arim
ele bimey yovyaqim ben-yeshu'a ben-yovtsadaq uvimey nechemeya hapecha ve'ezera hakohen hasovfer f

umibeyt hagilegal umisedovt geva' ve'azemavet ki chatserim banu lahem hameshorarim sevivovt yerushalaim

umibeney hakohanim bachatsotserovt zekhareya ven-yovnatan ben-shema'eya ben-mataneya ben-mikhaya ben-zakur ben-asaf
veechayv shema'eya va'azareel milalay gilalay ma'ay netaneel vihuda chanani bikheley-shir david ish haelohim ve'ezera hasovfer lifeneyhem
ve'al sha'ar ha'ayin venegedam 'alu 'al-ma'alovt 'ir david bama'ale lachovma me'al leveyt david ve'ad sha'ar hamayim mizerach
vehatovda hashenit hahovlekhet lemovl vaani achareyha vachatsi ha'am me'al lehachovma me'al lemigedal hatanurim ve'ad hachovma harechava
ume'al lesha'ar-eferayim ve'al-sha'ar hayeshana ve'al-sha'ar hadagim umigedal chananeel umigedal hamea ve'ad sha'ar hatson ve'amedu besha'ar hamatara
vata'amodena shetey hatovdot beveyt haelohim vaani vachatsi haseganim 'imi
vehakohanim eleyaqim ma'aseya mineyamin mikhaya eleyov'eynay zekhareya chananeya bachatsotserovt
uma'aseya ushema'eya veele'azar ve'uzi vihovchanan umalekiya ve'eylam va'azer vayashemi'u hameshorerim veyizeracheya hapaqid
vayizebechu vayovm-hahu zevachim gedovlim vayisemachu ki haelohim simecham simecha gedovla vegam hanashim vehayeladim samechu vatishama' simechat yerushalaim merachovq

vayipaqedu vayovm hahu anashim 'al-haneshakhovt laovtsarovt laterumovt lareshit velama'aserovt likhenovs bahem lisedey he'arim menaovt hatovra lakohanim velaleviyim ki simechat yehuda 'al-hakohanim ve'al-haleviyim ha'omedim
vayishemeru mishemeret eloheyhem umishemeret hatahora vehameshorerim vehasho'arim kemitsevat david shelomo venov
ki-vimey david veasaf miqedem rosh kh rashey q hameshorerim veshir-tehila vehodovt lelohim
vekhal-yiserael bimey zerubavel uvimey nechemeya notenim menayovt hameshorerim vehasho'arim devar-yovm beyovmov umaqedishim laleviyim vehaleviyim maqedishim liveney aharon f
bayovm hahu niqera besefer moshe beazeney ha'am venimetsa katuv bov asher lo-yavov 'amoni umoavi biqehal haelohim 'ad-'ovlam
ki lo qidemu et-beney yiserael balechem uvamayim vayisekor 'alayv et-bile'am leqalelov vayahafokh eloheynu haqelala liverakha
vayehi keshame'am et-hatovra vayavedilu khal-'erev miyiserael
velifeney mize eleyashiv hakohen natun belishekat beyt-eloheynu qarovv letovviya
vaya'as lov lisheka gedovla vesham hayu lefanim notenim et-haminecha halevovna vehakelim uma'esar hadagan hatirovsh vehayitsehar mitsevat haleviyim vehameshorerim vehasho'arim uterumat hakohanim
uvekhal-ze lo hayiti birushalaim ki bishenat sheloshim ushetayim learetacheshasete melekhe-bavel bati el-hamelekh uleqets yamim nishealeti min-hamelekh
vaavov lirushalaim vaavina vara'a asher 'asa eleyashiv letovviya la'asovt lov nisheka bechatserey beyt haelohim
vayera' li meod vaashelikha et-kal-keley veyt-tovviya hachuts min-halisheka
vaomera vayetaharu haleshakhovt vaashiva sham keley beyt haelohim et-haminecha vehalevovna f
vaede'a ki-menayovt haleviyim lo nitana vayiverechu ish-lesadehu haleviyim vehameshorerim 'osey hamelakha
vaariva et-haseganim vaomera madu'a ne'ezav beyt-haelohim vaeqebetsem vaa'amidem 'al-'amedam
vekhal-yehuda heviu ma'esar hadagan vehatirovsh vehayitsehar laovtsarovt
vaovtsera 'al-ovtsarovt shelemeya hakohen vetsadovq hasovfer ufedaya min-haleviyim ve'al-yadam chanan ben-zakur ben-mataneya ki neemanim necheshavu va'aleyhem lachaloq laacheyhem f
zakherah-li elohay 'al-zot veal-temach chasaday asher 'asiti beveyt elohay uvemishemarayv

bayamim hahema raiti vihuda ׀ dorekhim-gitovt ׀ bashabat umeviim ha'aremovt ve'omesim 'al-hachamorim veaf-yayin 'anavim uteenim vekhal-masa umeviim yerushalaim beyovm hashabat vaa'id beyovm mikheram tsayid
vehatsorim yashevu vah meviim dag vekhal-mekher umokherim bashabat liveney yehuda uvirushalaim
vaariva et chorey yehuda vaomera lahem mah-hadavar hara' haze asher atem 'osim umechalelim et-yovm hashabat
halov kho 'asu avoteykhem vayave eloheynu 'aleynu et kal-hara'a hazot ve'al ha'ir hazot veatem movsifim charovn 'al-yiserael lechalel et-hashabat f

vayehi kaasher tsalalu sha'arey yerushalaim lifeney hashabat vaomera vayisageru hadelatovt vaomera asher lo yifetachum 'ad achar hashabat umine'aray he'emadeti 'al-hashe'arim lo-yavov masa beyovm hashabat
vayalinu harokhelim umokherey khal-mimekar michuts lirushalaim pa'am ushetayim
vaa'ida vahem vaomera aleyhem madu'a atem lenim neged hachovma im-tishenu yad eshelach bakhem min-ha'et hahi lo-vau bashabat s
vaomera laleviyim asher yiheyu mitaharim uvaim shomerim hashe'arim leqadesh et-yovm hashabat gam-zot zakherah-li elohay vechusa 'alay kerov chasedekha f
gam ׀ bayamim hahem raiti et-hayehudim hoshivu nashim ashedovdiyovt kh ashedodiyovt q 'amovniyovt kh 'amoniyovt q movaviyovt
uveneyhem chatsi medaber ashedovdit veeynam makirim ledaber yehudit vekhileshovn 'am va'am
vaariv 'imam vaaqalelem vaake mehem anashim vaemeretem vaashebi'em belohim im-titenu venoteykhem liveneyhem veim-tiseu mibenoteyhem liveneykhem velakhem
halov 'al-ele chata-shelomo melekh yiserael uvagovyim harabim lo-haya melekh kamohu veahuv lelohayv haya vayitenehu elohim melekh 'al-kal-yiserael gam-ovtov hechetiu hanashim hanakheriyovt
velakhem hanishema' la'asot et kal-hara'a hagedovla hazot lime'ol beloheynu lehoshiv nashim nakheriyovt
umibeney yovyada' ben-eleyashiv hakohen hagadovl chatan lesanevalat hachoroni vaaverichehu me'alay
zakhera lahem elohay 'al gaoley hakehuna uverit hakehuna vehaleviyim
vetiharetim mikal-nekhar vaa'amida mishemarovt lakohanim velaleviyim ish bimelakhetov
ulequreban ha'etsim be'itim mezumanovt velabikurim zakherah-li elohay letovva
